questions.question: Consider an image with a vertical line and a horizontal line, and a single pixel between them. What is the affected area after applying a horizontal erosion to the image with a structuring element of size 3x3?
Given an image of a coin and its chain code representation, identify the orientation of the boundary at the pixel where the chain code value is 3.

Consider a binary image of a house and its chain code representation. What is the effect of applying a horizontal dilation to the image with a structuring element of size 5x5 on the boundary of the house?
